overall_comment: Both required figures are publication-ready: clear baseline-vs-method story, metric annotated, style guide followed, reader can immediately see the method works.

issues.issue: Suptitle reports 'test MSE = 0.000' which rounds the exact 0.0 measurement to three decimals.
issues.fix: Change suptitle metric to scientific notation or explicitly write 'test MSE ≈ 0 (target < 0.005)'.

issues.issue: Callout arrows land on empty whitespace rather than directly on a visible wiggle crest.
issues.fix: Reposition each arrow tip to a specific crest of the high-frequency oscillation.

issues.issue: Residual panels (a) and (b) do not share a y-axis scale.
FFT panel (c) ω=5 callout uses small font that collides with red dashed line.
issues.fix: Move label above the peak and bump fontsize to 10.
